[-1]: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn.
[-3]: Put two loyalty counters on target creature. It becomes a copy of Vand for as long as it has a loyalty counter on it, except it isn't legendary.
cards.notes:
CHANGELOG: -3 now makes creatures into nonlegendary copies instead of just granting loyalty abilities

ALTERNATE: Revert change, SL 4 -> 5, -1 only hits creatures with lesser mana value , last ability -3 -> -4
